entities.mentionText:
°
所有價格為新台幣計價,另加收百分之十服務費。若您有自帶酒水的需求,本餐廳將收取酒水服務費,葡萄酒每瓶$500,烈酒每瓶$1,000。如
有特殊飲食要求或對某些事物過敏而希望瞭解食物成分,請您聯繫餐廳經理
All All prices are in TWD and subject to 10% service charge. The corkage fee $500 per bottle is vintage wine. And is $1,000 per bottle for
other alcoholic drinks. For those with special dietary requirements or allergies who may wish to know about the food ingredients used, please
ask for the manager.

所有價格為新台幣計價,另加收百分之十服務費。若您有自帶酒水的需求,本餐廳將收取酒水服務費,葡萄酒每瓶$500,烈酒每瓶$1,000。如
有特殊飲食要求或對某些事物過敏而希望瞭解食物成分,請您聯繫餐廳經理
All All prices are in TWD and subject to 10% service charge. The corkage fee $500 per bottle is vintage wine. And is $1,000 per bottle for
other alcoholic drinks. For those with special dietary requirements or allergies who may wish to know about the food ingredients used, please
ask for the manager.
